message:
fix(diary): Add missing tags and searchAnchors fields to diary entries

Fixes DiaryEntry construction to include required fields:

- Added tags: [] (empty array) to generated diary entries
- Added searchAnchors: [] (empty array) for SEO/search optimization

These fields are defined in DiaryEntrySchema but were missing from the
generateDiary() output, causing Zod validation failures when loading
saved diary entries.

The tags and searchAnchors will be populated by downstream processing:
- tags: Set during reflection based on extracted topics
- searchAnchors: Computed from keyLearnings and challenges keywords

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
